title: Avoid naming non-constructor methods the same as the enclosing class
description: Having a class and some of its methods sharing the same name is misleading and can lead to confusion. Noncompliant code example: public class Foo { public Foo() {...} public void Foo(String label) {...} } Compliant solution: public class Foo { public Foo() {...} public void foo(String label) {...} }
recommendation: Rename non-constructor methods to avoid the same name as the enclosing class
impact: Improves code readability and reduces potential confusion

checks.message: Rename non-constructor methods to avoid the same name as the enclosing class
